basic_details.job_title: Sainik School Kalikiri Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline for Art Master, PTI-Cum Matron Posts
basic_details.short_information: Sainik School Kalikiri Academic Staff Notification 2026 has been released on 13 June 2026 on the official website https://sskal.ac.in. A total of 2 vacancies have been announced through the Sainik School Kalikiri Academic Staff Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Minimum Age: 21 years Maximum Age: 50 years Age as on 03-07-2026

qualification.education_qualification: Bachelor's degree in Drawing and Painting/Sculpture / Graphic Art / Fine Arts with 50% marks, B.Ed Degree with 50% marks, Four year integrated B.P.Ed. course with 50% marks, Bachelor's Degree in Physical Education with 50% marks along with B.P.Ed.
qualification.details: Art Master: Bachelor's degree in Drawing and Painting/Sculpture / Graphic Art / Fine Arts from a recognised institution with at least 50% marks provided that the candidates should have studied Drawing and Painting as Main subject in all the years of graduation. B.Ed Degree from NCTE recognized institution with at least 50% marks. PTI-Cum Matron (Female): Four year integrated B.P.Ed. course from NCTE recognized institution with at least 50% marks OR Bachelor's Degree in Physical Science/ Physical Education / Physical Education and Sports offered by NCTE recognized institution with at least 50% marks provided that, Physical Education is studied in all the years of graduation along with B.P.Ed. of at least one year duration (or its equivalent) from any NCTE recognized institution with at least 50% marks OR Bachelor's degree with Physical Education as an elective subject with 50% marks and participation in National Or State or Inter-University competitions in sports or games or athletics recognized by Association of Indian University or Indian Olympic Association along with B.P.Ed. of at least one year duration (or its equivalent) from any NCTE recognized institution with at least 50% marks.

selection_process: Shortlisting based on essential qualifications Selection Procedure
how_to_apply: Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: https://sskal.ac.in.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 03-07-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for Sainik School Kalikiri Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to receive the application for the Sainik School Kalikiri Academic Staff posts is 03-07-2026. Ensure your application reaches the school before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for Academic Staff at Sainik School Kalikiri?
faq.answer: There are a total of 2 vacancies for Academic Staff positions at Sainik School Kalikiri, including Art Master and PTI-Cum Matron (Female).

faq.question: Q3. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application mode for Sainik School Kalikiri Recruitment 2026 is offline. Candidates need to download the form and send it via post.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Academic Staff positions?
faq.answer: The selected candidates will receive a salary of Rs. 58,819/- per month for the Academic Staff positions.

faq.question: Q5. What is the minimum and maximum age limit for the posts?
faq.answer: The minimum age limit is 21 years and the maximum age limit is 50 years as of 03-07-2026.

faq.question: Q6. What are the educational qualifications required for the Art Master post?
faq.answer: For the Art Master post, candidates need a Bachelor's degree in Drawing and Painting/Sculpture/Graphic Art/Fine Arts with at least 50% marks and a B.Ed Degree with at least 50% marks.

faq.question: Q7. What are the educational qualifications for the PTI-Cum Matron (Female) post?
faq.answer: The PTI-Cum Matron (Female) post requires a four-year integrated B.P.Ed. course or a Bachelor's Degree in Physical Education with specific conditions as mentioned in the notification.

faq.question: Q8. Is there any application fee for SC/ST candidates?
faq.answer: Yes, SC/ST candidates need to pay an application fee of Rs. 250/-. General/OBC candidates have to pay Rs. 500/-, and PwBD candidates have no fee.

faq.question: Q9. Where can I download the application form?
faq.answer: The application form can be downloaded from the official website of Sainik School Kalikiri, which is https://sskal.ac.in.

faq.question: Q10. What is the selection process for these posts?
faq.answer: The selection process involves shortlisting based on essential qualifications, followed by a selection procedure as decided by the school authorities.
